creator: scottro11@gmail.com
text:
I'm running into this same issue on a fresh FreeBSD-10.1 install with icedtea-web-1.5.2.  On a somewhat older install, with icedtea-web-1.5.1 I didn't run into the problem. 
The fix in comment 10, changing the almost last in the shell script to 
exec "${COMMAND[@]}" works for me.
